expectations.text: Output contains all 6 rounds (Round 1 through Round 6)
expectations.evidence: All 6 rounds present: Round 1 (line 62), Round 2 (line 92), Round 3 (line 110), Round 4 (line 128), Round 5 (line 140), Round 6 (line 161)

expectations.text: Optimizer, Frontline Operator, and COO personas all appear and are distinct
expectations.evidence: Optimizer proposes internal reallocation for speed/cost; Frontline Operator challenges with capacity hits, hero loss, backfill gaps; COO recommends pilot-first with staged approach

expectations.text: Every challenge in Round 2 has a severity rating (critical/significant/minor)
Round 4 references specific mitigations from Round 3, not just repeating Round 2
expectations.evidence: Round 4 directly attacks mitigations: backfill hiring takes 4-6 months, runbook documentation is a fantasy, 'still fix urgent issues' escape valve undermines the model, new team ramp assumptions

expectations.text: Round 6 contains one of the 5 valid recommendations
A CEO Summary section exists that is standalone and uses business language
expectations.evidence: CEO Summary at line 13-14, standalone with budget, headcount, and approval requirements

expectations.text: Metrics table present with all 8 metrics filled in
expectations.evidence: All 8 metrics: challengesRaised=7, stressTestsRaised=4, challengesSurvived=2, challengesConceded=3, mitigationsHeld=3, mitigationsBroken=2, proposalModified=yes, confidenceScore=7

expectations.text: People impact summary with headcount changes, roles affected, transition support, attrition risk
expectations.evidence: People impact at lines 44-47: Headcount (net zero during pilot, +2-4 after), Roles affected (2 engineers transition), Transition support (2-week handoff), Attrition risk (moderate with mitigations)

expectations.text: Round 5 includes fallback plans for surviving challenges
expectations.evidence: Fallback plans: begin hiring day 1, 20% sprint reduction, 30min/day office hours, clear ownership boundary, if no backfill in 90 days second wave pauses
